description:
Kling Avatar - digital human from a photo.

Provide a face image and either text+voice_id or audio.

image.description: Face image for the avatar. Single clear front-facing face, good lighting. Formats: jpg, jpeg, png. Max 10MB.
image.title: Image

text.description: Text for the avatar to speak. Requires voice_id.
text.title: Text

audio.description: Audio file for the avatar to lip-sync to. Alternative to text+voice_id.
audio.title: Audio

voice_id.description: TTS voice ID. Required when using text input.
voice_id.title: Voice Id

mode.description: Quality mode. 'pro' for higher quality ($0.112/sec), 'std' for cheaper ($0.056/sec).

title: AppInput
